title: Content Shield - Content Quality
description: Overview of content quality metrics across all shields

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNTIF(passed) / COUNT(*) * 100 as pass_rate FROM content_shield.events
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM content_shield.events
SELECT shield_name, COUNTIF(passed) as passed, COUNTIF(NOT passed) as failed FROM content_shield.events GROUP BY shield_name
SELECT TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(timestamp, HOUR) as time, COUNT(*) as checks, COUNTIF(passed) as passed FROM content_shield.events GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
